message:
🐛 Fix Auto-QA triage: apply label directly instead of Prow command (#192)

Prow rejects `/triage accepted` from github-actions[bot] since it is
not a GitHub org member.  Replace the comment-based triage with the
`triage/accepted` label applied at issue creation time, removing the
now-unnecessary `auto_triage` input and `AUTO_TRIAGE` env var.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
